title: Elderly/Disabled Home Rental Listings - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Elderly/Disabled Home Rental Listings 8 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF MALHEUR AND HARNEY COUNTIES HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers the following housing programs: -Section 8 Housing Choice Voucher Program: As of April 2018, Section 8 is accepting pre-applications for the wait list and has a 12-month wait time -Family Self-Sufficiency Program: Helps Section 8 recipients obtain education and job skills in order to become financially self-sufficient -Housing Choice Voucher Homeownership Program: Helps Section 8 recipients receive assistance toward a monthly mortgage payment -Low-Rent Public Housing Program: Provides federally subsidized rental housing -Farm Labor Housing: Offers housing for active and retired agricultural workers Also fields complaints about Section 8 and public housing programs. 959 Fortner Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: -Low-income households; applicants from outside Malheur and Harney Counties must reside in Malheur or Harney County for one year before requesting to move to another county. -Farm labor housing is available to domestic agricultural workers including those working on fish and oyster farms and on-farm processing; can be retired and/or disabled from agricultural work; must be a U.S. citizen or permanent resident. Available to laborers that handle any raw materials. Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 889-9661 101 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Housing Choice Voucher (HCV) rental assistance, including a Homeownership Voucher Program. Also offers a Family Self-Sufficiency program, Housing Rehab program, and manages several area affordable housing complexes for families, farmworkers, older adults, and people with special needs. 135 NE Dunn Place Mcminnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Varies; some programs may have residency or income requirements. Call for information. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 883-4300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARION COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Marion County Housing Authority (MCHA), under contract with the US Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD), administers the Section 8 Voucher Program and several other rental assistance programs. MCHA also owns and manages several affordable apartment complexes for seniors, families, and farm laborers. Serves the rural areas of Marion County, which are outside the Urban Growth Boundary of the City of Salem. No assistance is available for Salem/Keizer residents. 2645 Portland Road NE Suite 200 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Eligibility varies by program. HUD-established income limits apply. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm, closed federal holidays Email (503) 798-4170 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers federal housing programs. Maintains a list of affordable housing and a bulletin board of local properties, including subsidized properties that are independently managed. Fields complaints about public housing and Section 8 housing. 147 S Main Avenue Warrenton, OR 97146 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm; by appointment only Email (503) 861-0119 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST PILOT PROJECT HOUSING RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on affordable housing and shelter including case management, listing, and screening services. 1430 SW Broadway Suite 200 Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: -Household must contain one member at least 55 years old -Household must reside in Multnomah County or be homeless -Household must not contain any minor children under 18 years old -Household must have a plan for resuming rent payment -Household must meet income requirements; priority for those making 20% Median Family Income (FMI) and below Other criteria may apply. Focus is on serving older adults with health concerns or disabilities or who have very low income, language barriers, no support system, or other barriers to housing. Hours: Message Line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 227-5605 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST REAL ESTATE CAPITAL CORPORATION AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides housing for families, older adults, and adults with disabilities. Specializes in the property management and rehabilitation of HUD/Section 8, Rural Development, and Tax Credit Housing. 210 W Mallard Drive Suite A Boise, ID 83706 Eligibility: Varies by property Hours: No standard hours (208) 375-9407 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UMATILLA COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers the federal and public housing programs including the Section 8 Housing Voucher program and manages several low-income apartment complexes. Listings of low-income properties, rural areas, and properties for agricultural workers. 155 SW Tenth Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: -Low-income households -Section 8: Income limits are 30% of median household income for the county (chart on website under public housing) -Programs prioritize families with children, older adults, and people with disabilities Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-12pm and 1pm-4pm, Wednesday 1pm-4pm Email (541) 567-3241 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT PORTLAND FIELD OFFICE DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals and information about income-based housing through local Public Housing Authorities and other providers, Federal Housing Administration (FHA) loans, manufactured housing; and referrals to HUD-approved housing counseling agencies for foreclosure, purchase, reverse mortgage, and budgeting assistance. A list of HUD-funded housing is available online. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 972042825 Eligibility: Income restrictions vary by program. Acceptance of rental application is at apartment manager's discretion. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm, closed federal holidays Message line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 222-2600 0 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF MALHEUR AND HARNEY COUNTIES HOUSING AUTHORITY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY OF YAMHILL COUNTY MARION COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY MARION COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY NORTHWEST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY NORTHWEST PILOT PROJECT HOUSING RESOURCES UMATILLA COUNTY HOUSING AUTHORITY HOUSING AUTHORITY UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT
